strategy_reasoning: Uses the renovation/spring cleaning metaphor to explain the website redesign and infrastructure updates. The sequence moves from the visual 'face lift' to new capabilities (vision/audio) to backend stability (eating bugs).
visual_style: Cozy 8-bit pixel art with chunky sprites, soft lighting, and mandatory lime green (#ecf874) accents. Stardew Valley meets lo-fi dev diary.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, putting the finishing touches on a wooden sign that says 'HELLO'. She holds a pixelated paintbrush dripping with lime green (#ecf874) paint. A bucket of lime paint sits on the grass. Soft pastel garden background with blooming code-flowers. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'FRESH PAINT'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients.
images.description: Visualizes the website redesign and copy improvements as a physical renovation.

images.prompt: Chunky pixel art of the cute CRT monitor robot holding a glowing holographic photo (representing the new Grok image model). The robot's screen shows excited eyes. Polly the bee hovers nearby wearing tiny wizard glasses, inspecting a floating audio waveform (ElevenLabs support). Lime green (#ecf874) data sparkles in the air. Soft lavender and cream background. Warm lighting, 8-bit aesthetic. Text in pixel font: 'NEW TOYS'.
images.description: Highlights the new Grok-imagine integration and custom ElevenLabs voice support.

images.prompt: Cozy pixel art interior scene. The round tan Nomnom creature is happily eating a stack of papers labeled 'BUGS' and '429 ERRORS'. Polly the bee is relaxing on a lime green (#ecf874) beanbag chair, watching a retro terminal screen that shows a stable green status bar. Warm indoor lighting, cozy carpet, lo-fi chill vibes. Text in pixel font: 'STABLE'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic.
images.description: Represents the bug fixes, rate limit handling, and stability improvements.

caption:
Renovation week. 

The website got a fresh coat of paint—new flow, better copy, clearer tier cards. Under the hood, we added a dedicated media upload service (finally), support for Grok-imagine, and custom ElevenLabs voices.

Also fed a bunch of bugs to the backend—stabilized the Wan video pipeline and taught the API some better manners regarding rate limits.

14 PRs merged. Go build something weird.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #generativeai
alt_text: Pixel art carousel: 1. Polly the bee painting a sign lime green. 2. Robot and Polly examining new holographic tools. 3. Nomnom creature eating bug report papers while Polly relaxes.
